title: Fix onSelectRow Dropdown Positioning in Data Mapping Off-Canvas
description:
Updated the `onSelectRow()` function in `Data_Mapping_offCanvas.js` to fix dropdown positioning alignment and hide deactivated fields that were affecting row height calculations.

### Changes
- Dropdown now aligns precisely to the selected row using absolute positioning relative to the first column cell
- Deactivated fields (`DTE_Field_migrate`, `DTE_Field_reporting`) are hidden on row selection to prevent layout shifts
- Dictionary view and migration view both handle row selection with appropriate dropdown visibility toggling
- Code was updated directly on FTP and pulled by developer
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown aligns correctly to the selected row in dictionary view
Dropdown aligns correctly to the selected row in migration view
Deactivated fields are hidden on row selection
No layout shifts caused by hidden fields changing row height
ux_changes: Dropdown menu now properly aligns to the selected row and deactivated fields no longer cause visual layout shifts.
implementation_notes: Code was pushed directly to FTP by the reporter. Developer pulled the updated file and confirmed no additional changes were needed.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the file was already pulled from FTP and no re-implementation was needed. Ticket marked complete.
